__doc__: ANNOTATED EXAMPLE content JSON for build_report.py. Copy this, rename to content.cn.json / content.en.json, edit the values, then: python3 scripts/build_report.py content.cn.json. Keys prefixed __ are comments and are ignored by the renderer ONLY if you delete them — string.Template does not strip them, so REMOVE all __* keys in your real file. (Real working copies live next to the Cardiff report: cardiff-2026/content.cn.json / content.en.json.)
__lang: 'cn' or 'en'. Picks the built-in typography preset (fonts, sizes, quote glyph). CN uses Alibaba PuHuiTi; EN uses Montserrat. This is the ONLY thing that switches the whole look — you never touch CSS.
__output: output HTML filename, relative to this JSON's folder. Override with -o on the CLI.
__style: OPTIONAL. A dict of CSS-value overrides on top of the preset, e.g. {"hero_h1_size":"clamp(40px,7vw,80px)"}. Omit entirely unless you must deviate. See PRESET_CN/PRESET_EN keys in build_report.py for the full list.

head.__lang_attr: <html lang=...> value. Defaults zh-CN for cn / en for en.
head.keywords: ...OPTIONAL comma-separated SEO/social tags, e.g. 'QS 2027, World University Rankings, Study-Abroad'. Omit to leave the keywords meta empty...

topbar.__logo: Logo is AUTO by lang — leave it out. EN→uhomes.com only (uhomes-logo-red.svg); CN→3-brand combined 异乡好居｜异乡缴费｜异乡人才 (uhomes-cn-combined-logo.svg). Keep the relevant svg alongside the output so it shows in print. Override only for university/apartment reports via logo_src (single img) or logo_html (full custom).
topbar.issue:
卡迪夫市场观察
2026 年 6 月

hero.kicker: 留学租房数据洞察 · 内部决策版
hero.h1:
上涨的英国市场里，
卡迪夫，掉队的城
hero.__h1:
headline.
for line breaks, ... for the coral-red emphasis word (inv 8).
hero.__meta: exactly 4 hero meta cells: b = big neutral-ink number, span = small caption (these are plain facts, not up/down deltas — kept neutral).

__stats: the headline stat CARDS (brand review 2026-06-18, designer mockup): each card = a coloured circular ICON BADGE + big semantic number + bold title (span) + muted subtitle (sub). Exactly 4. Colour is SEMANTIC by sign: leading + → growth green (↑ badge), leading − → decline red (↓ badge), UNSIGNED → neutral ink (bars badge). Override colour with "tone":"pos"|"neg"|"neutral" (e.g. a bad rank like #17 → "neg" to make it red). Override the glyph with "icon":"up"|"down"|"bars"|"globe"|"flat". "sub" is the optional second caption line. A trailing % in b is auto-shrunk. Don't mix a signed delta with a bare ratio ("7 / 8") in the strip — rewrite as a big count.

blocks.__variant: CHART TYPE (default 'bar'). Match the form to the question: 'line'=trend over time; 'donut'=share/proportion; 'column'=vertical bars for a time comparison; 'bar'=ranking (horizontal). Add "diverging":true to a bar chart so NEGATIVE values show (extend left in decline-red). See REFERENCE §Chart variants.
blocks.__mode: BAR HELPER MODE (variant 'bar'/'column' only). 'scale' (default): data-w=value/max*scale. 'percent': data-w=value, printed N%. 'raw_w': you give w+value_text, no math, for hand-tuned YoY-% bars.
blocks.__scale: only used by mode 'scale'; biggest bar maps to this width (~95). Default 95.
blocks.__bars: Each row: label + value. COLOUR IS SEMANTIC (4-colour system, brand review 2026-06-18): default = neutral grey; hl:true → THE highlighted/subject bar (brand #FF5A5F, bold label); up:true → growth green; neg:true OR value<0 → decline red (in a normal bar the width zeroes; in a 'diverging' bar it extends LEFT). value_text overrides the printed cell ('+22%','2.0万'). w = explicit data-w (REQUIRED for raw_w). DO NOT use the legacy style:'coral'/'sand'/'ink' classes — preflight WARNs. For 'line': rows are ordered points (hl/down mark a dot). For 'donut': rows are slices (hl = brand slice); add "center":{"value":"47%","label":"…"}.

blocks.__fig: OPTIONAL inline restrained number prepended to the FIRST paragraph (inv 5: this is the .fig style, NOT a giant .bignum billboard).
blocks.__style: OPTIONAL raw inline style on the .note div.
blocks.__ps: list of paragraph HTML strings. Inline <b> for emphasis.

chapters.__blocks: ordered list of blocks rendered inside the chapter. chart/note blocks auto-wrap in a single-column .cols container (inv 3: never left-right, chart on top / note below). Wrap a block in {"type":"group","blocks":[...]} to nest it in a bare <div> (matches the source's column wrappers; purely structural).
chapters.__pull_quote: OPTIONAL. Rendered after the chapter blocks (inv 9: coral quote mark + cite).

blocks.__items: the numbered recommendation list. h3 supports ... for coral emphasis. A chapter whose blocks are all 'acts' renders them at section level (no .cols wrapper).

footer.__brand: EN can use 'uhomes.com' to color '.com' coral.
footer.note: 数据来源... (可含 table_name) ...仅供内部决策参考。
footer.__note: footer fine print, rendered at 10px (inv 4). Inline <code> allowed.
